channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The US has a single rare earths mine. Chinese export limits are energizing a push for more
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — America’s only rare earths mine heard from anxious companies soon after China responded to President Donald Trump’s tariffs this month by limiting exports of those minerals used for military applications and in many high-tech devices.
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart opens South Bay tech hub in expansion for its web unit
item.description: Walmart has started moving employees into a huge tech hub in Sunnyvale where the retail titan could employ thousands of workers.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Everything new on Hulu in May 2025 – stream my favorite Pamela Anderson movie, celebrate Star Wars Day with the original trilogy and more
item.description: From reality TV and the original Star Wars trilogy, here's the full list of titles coming to Hulu in May 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: TikTok is obsessed with this investor who bought 30 floors of a Chicago skyscraper
item.description: One of the more unique takes on the POV trend on TikTok: “POV: You bought a 100-year-old skyscraper . . .
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: 8 ways diversity and inclusion help teams perform better
item.description: Diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) initiatives have been taking a beating lately. On his first day in office, US President Donald Trump issued an executive order calling government efforts to advance racial equity and to support underserved communities “illegal and immoral discrimination.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Learning how to measure genAI’s impact
item.description: Top picks for generative AI readers on InfoWorld AI will require more software developers, not fewer Data show AI assistants make it significantly faster and easier to develop software, spurring companies to tackle more software projects—and (surprise!) hire more developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How U.S. tariffs could impact cloud computing
item.description: The cloud computing industry has long been the backbone of digital transformation. In 2022 alone, this sector surpassed $480 billion in global valuation, and its growth trajectory remains strong.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: British businesses are getting used to AI at work - but there are still plenty of hurdles to overcome
item.description: British businesses are benefiting from AI, but the same old hurdles still prevent some from getting the full benefits.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Google ruled an online ad monopoly, could be forced to break up its advertising products
item.description: In a landmark decision, a US District Judge has ruled that Google illegally monopolized the ad tech market.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: SpaceX is the top contender to build Trump’s ‘Golden Dome’ missile shield, sources say
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX and two partners have emerged as frontrunners to win a crucial part of President Donald Trump’s “Golden Dome” missile defense shield, six people familiar with the matter said.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Netflix Surpasses Analysts' Expectations Amid Economic Uncertainty
item.description: Netflix reports a 24% increase in earnings and 13% rise in revenue, outperforming forecasts despite economic chaos and Trump's tariffs.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: IBM X-Force: Stealthy attacks on the rise, toolkits targeting AI emerge
item.description: Cybercriminals are adopting increasingly stealthy tactics for breaking into networks, while attacks targeting specific AI technologies are an emerging threat.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Kyndryl launches private cloud services for enterprise AI deployments
item.description: Kyndryl has taken the wraps off a suite of private cloud services designed for enterprise customers that want to rapidly deploy AI applications in production environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Headlamp: A multicluster management UI for Kubernetes
item.description: As important as Kubernetes is to the modern cloud-native stack, it’s still not easy to use on your own hardware. That’s surprising, considering how long it’s been around.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Gleam 1.10 improves compiler, JavaScript codegen
item.description: Gleam 1.10, a new release of the type-safe programming language for the Erlang virtual machine and JavaScript runtimes, is now available. The update features compiler improvements centering on holding more information and improving exhaustive analysis.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg wraps up testimony in antitrust case
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg emphasized in federal court on Wednesday that he bought Instagram and WhatsApp because he saw value in the companies — not to take out competitors, as the Federal Trade Commission alleges in a historic antitrust trial.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Intel sells off majority stake in its FPGA business
item.description: Intel has spun off its programmable solutions group as a standalone FPGA company, selling a majority stake in the company to a private equity firm. Intel is taking a fairly hefty loss on this deal.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tech shares fall after Nvidia says new US controls on exports of AI chip will cost it $5.5 billion
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Shares in computer chipmakers slumped Wednesday after Nvidia said tighter U.S. government controls on exports of computer chips used for artificial intelligence will cost it an extra $5.5 billion.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: DHS cancels federal neurodiversity workforce contract
item.description: DHS did not provide a reason for cancelling CISA's neurodiversity workforce pilot, but it came amid the Trump administration's anti-DEI push. The post DHS cancels federal neurodiversity workforce contract first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Visa cancellations sow panic for international students, with more than 1,000 fearing deportation
item.description: The speed and scope of the federal government’s efforts to terminate the legal status of international students have stunned colleges and universities across the country.
item.dc:creator: Annie Ma, Makiya Seminera And Christopher L. Keller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: China pursuing 3 alleged US operatives over cyberattacks during Asian Games
item.description: TAIPEI, Taiwan (AP) — China said Tuesday it is pursuing three alleged U.S. operatives accused of carrying out cyberattacks on Chinese infrastructure during the Asian Games held in the city of Harbin in February. A notice from the Harbin police headquarters named them as Katheryn A. Wilson, Robert J.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER BODEEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Transforming the WAN to future-proof the network infrastructure
item.description: Enterprise network infrastructures have evolved significantly alongside the rise of cloud computing, Software-as-a-Service (SaaS), and AI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Via porn, gore and ultra-violence, extremist groups are sinking hooks online into the very young
item.description: PARIS (AP) — After his arrest, the boy's mother was stunned to discover that her 12-year-old had been learning how to kill and gorging on videos of decapitation and torture so gruesome they made even case-hardened French court officials look away.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: White House record-keeping revamp
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DHS employees consider workforce transition amid major uncertainty
item.description: Staff across DHS, including at CISA and FEMA, are considering deferred resignation or other offers amid reports that their agencies will be targeted for cuts. The post DHS employees consider workforce transition amid major uncertainty first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network
